chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 6332 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 05.03.2026 None present for the Petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG. ---------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. The absence of representation today suggests that the Petitioner has lost interest in the matter, which stands dismissed accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz
